ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of operating system used by the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time when the user last logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Logout, Search auto, Search manual) */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the interaction occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., Delete session, Search auto page, Search manual page) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction (e.g., search query, item ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the search was performed */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* The string of the search query */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Time when the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of search query (e.g., product, category, brand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was favorited */,
  "added_time" TEXT /* Time when the item was added to favorites */,
  "removed_time" TEXT /* Time when the item was removed from favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time when the item was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the item belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the item */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is recommended the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that is recommended */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation that was interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_query_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query that was clicked */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was clicked */,
  "click_time" TEXT /* Time when the click occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_query_clicks_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_query_clicks_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference for the notification type (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
